aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite this business due to strong local SEO signals, but conversational content and authority signals are lacking.
quick_wins: Expand conversational content to address common HVAC queries in a Q&A format.
Implement HowTo schema for common services like air duct cleaning and attic insulation.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citations and ensure uniformity.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for service processes.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and detailed service explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to detailed HVAC maintenance and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema and expanding existing FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed expertise in HVAC services.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP is strong, but AI assistants prioritize sites with conversational content and detailed schema markup.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach will enhance your site's conversational content, implement critical schema markup, and position you as the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in AI-driven search results.
